case_title: NGUYEN, LAUNA vs. BANH, DAT TAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, LAUNA AS TO DEFENDANT BANH, DAT TAN MUEHLBAUER, MONEKA URBANSKE MUEHLBAUER, ROBERT SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-21-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-24-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-01-1993
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-07-1993, OFF CALENDAR

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-07-1993, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-07-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), WHY FURTHER SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-07-1993 CONTINUED FROM SEP-07-1993 TO OCT-07-1993 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-21-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-21-1993, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC RE CONTEMPT AGAINST PLT AND COUNSEL FOR FTA AND FAILURE TO FILE STATEMENTS AND OR DISMISSAL. HEARING SET FOR SEP-07-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PLTF.'S ATTY.'S DECLARATION IN RESPONSE TO OSC RE: CONTEMPT AGAINST PLTF. & COUNSEL FOR FTA AND FAILURE TO FILE STATEMENTS AND OR DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, LAUNA
